title: More Food xD
body:
The More Food Mod was created by Volwert123. Many new food have been added such as:

- Cooked Carrot
- Kelp Soup
- Apple Pieces

To prepare the food, new ingredients were added!

______________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Follow me on my Discord server ! ( https://discord.gg/MrEDnrZFnu )

______________________________________________________________________________________________________________

I recommend the mod Just Enough Items to see all the recipes. 

______________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Supported languages:

English, German, French, Spanish, Russian

More languages are coming soon.

______________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Planned functions:

- more languages
- more food
